# Ignite Recovery

Ignite Recovery is an outpatient counseling and recovery support organization located at 672 Bedford St, Fall River, MA 02720. They are a BSAS-licensed, women-owned agency. 
Their mission is centered around building power and agency, not dependence. Their core tagline is "Recovery is your choice."

## Services
- Outpatient Counseling
- Recovery Coaching
- Case Management
- CSP-JI (Community Support Program for Justice-Involved Individuals)
- Pathways to Agency

## Insurance
They accept MassHealth and Tufts Direct.

## Contact
- Phone: (508) 296-0523
- Email: info@ignitemyrecovery.com
- Provider Referral Email: community@ignitemyrecovery.com
